name: Power Mech Projects Limited
summary: Power Mech Projects Limited provides services in power and infrastructure sectors in India and internationally. The company engages in the erection, testing, and commissioning of boilers, turbines, and generators; balance of plant works for the power sector, as well as for other industries, including petrochemicals, steel, and cement; and overhauling, maintenance, renovation, and modernization of power plants. It also undertakes various civil, architectural, and structural works, including topographical surveying, geotechnical investigation, mass excavation and area grading, bored cast insitu piling, TG rafts and decks, machine and GT foundations, mill and bunker fabrication and erection, CW pump houses and channel works, CW pipe line fabrication and laying, cooling towers, coal handling plants, plant roads and drains, pipe racks, refinery tanks and shells, enabling works, balance of plant civil works, commercial and residential buildings, and gas power projects and R&M civil works, as well as power house and control room buildings civil and architecture. In addition, the company engages in the provision of various services in the fields of petro chemical plants, irrigation, cement, oil and gas, and steel industries; and power transmission and distribution activities. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
